label: Feature attribution & interpretability

node.label: Feature attribution & interpretability
node.definition: Interpretability methods attribute predictions or internal representations to input features, examples, concepts, directions, or learned components.
node.why_it_matters: In this atlas graph, Feature attribution & interpretability is modeled as depending on Statistics & experimental design, Embeddings & distributed representations and feeding downstream nodes such as Mechanistic interpretability & circuit analysis.
